name: Lobster Bisque Elegante
recipeIngredient: 4 Frozen rock lobster tails, weighing about 8 ounces each
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring enough water to a boil to cover the lobster tails; add 1 teaspoon salt per quart of water.
2. Drop the frozen lobster tails into the boiling water and cook for 11 minutes (or 3 minutes plus the weight of the largest lobster tail).
3. Remove the meat from the lobster shells and dice it. Set aside.
4. Crush the lobster shells and put them in a saucepan with 3 cups of water.
5. Add the seasoned stock base, onion flakes, coriander seeds, bay leaf, vegetable flakes, and peppercorns to the shell mixture. Simmer for 30 minutes; strain out the solids.
6. Melt the butter in a saucepan and stir in the flour, Bon Appetit seasoning, and salt until bubbly.
7. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
8. Gradually add the milk to the sauce, simmering gently and stirring continuously until thickened.
9. Stir in the lobster meat and cream. Do not allow it to boil.
10. Serve piping hot.
